themes.exampleQuote: get the raspberry lychee macaroon, it is gluten free made with almond flour and it is the best thing I've ever put in my mouth hands down
Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed
Please do not miss this hidden gem in Pittsburgh
there are multiple locations so please make sure you check it out

notable_quote: Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers stack superlatives on the pastry quality, especially the raspberry lychee macaron, with almost no documented complaints across 525 reviews, though the written reviews that exist are brief and surface-level, leaving menu depth and experience mostly undescribed.
quarter_narrative: Thirteen Pittsburgh creators posted 15 TikToks tagged at La Gourmandine Hazelwood this quarter, pulling 736,954 plays while the bakery itself posted zero times to Instagram in the last 41 days and holds no TikTok account of its own. The city is filming the croissants; the bakery is not filming back. That gap is the whole story of this ranking: a near-perfect review signal, a full conversion path, a creator community already doing the heavy lifting, and a social presence that has gone quiet at exactly the moment the audience is largest. In the Pittsburgh Sweets family, Page's leads this issue on social momentum; La Gourmandine Hazelwood leads on review sentiment and creator-generated reach, and closing the Instagram gap is the clearest path to moving off the Ones to Watch tier.
tldr_read: Exceptional reviews and creator-generated TikTok reach, but the bakery's own Instagram has been silent for 41 days. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Pastry Shops.
tldr_meaning: Every signal axis except Instagram Momentum is at or above the family median; restarting the feed is the one remaining variable separating this business from the Icons tier.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: First In Pittsburgh Pastry, Built On 736,000 Creator Plays. The Bakery's Own Feed Has Gone Quiet.

playbook.headline: Break the 41-day Instagram silence now
playbook.action: Post at least twice a week to Instagram; the account has been dark since before the top TikTok pulled 459,100 plays.

playbook.headline: Claim a TikTok account before creators define you
playbook.action: Thirteen creators have filmed 15 videos here with no account to tag; a single owned TikTok presence captures that existing reach.

playbook.headline: Turn the macaron into a visual anchor
playbook.action: The raspberry lychee macaron is the one specific product in 525 reviews; dedicated photos and short clips can deepen a thin written-review catalog.
